title: Synthetic dengue monthly cases per 100K, illustrative tropical city
generating_model: vector-host SIRS with seasonal vector mortality + 2-year waning immunity

generating_parameters_TRUTH_FOR_NOTEBOOK.seasonal_phase_radians: pi (mu_v minimum in mid-year, simulating wet season)

purpose: Used by Chapter 16 notebooks to demonstrate seasonal-R_0 calibration and intervention-sensitivity analysis. Notebooks fit without knowing the truth.
